notes: SHIP 2 (Part B) — EDP→Reconcile vendor cross-check (Master Pivot, step 2 of 3 complete; EDP now in its AUDITOR role). A vendor as-built EDP can be attached to an EXISTING Master-scoped deployment and cross-checked against the deployment's FROZEN Master snapshot. (1) ATTACH: deploy_showDetail gains an 'ATTACH VENDOR EDP' button gated to dep.scope.source==='master'; vendorEdp_open/vendorEdp_attach paste a vendor EDP, run it through the existing deploy_parseEDP_local, and store it as dep.vendorEdpParsed (+ dep.vendorEdpAttachedAt) via deploy_saveAll. It NEVER touches dep.edpParsed/edpHash and NEVER creates a deployment — the architect plan is untouched (EDP-as-architect retires in Ship 3). (2) CROSS-CHECK: reconcile_run gains block (C) via _rec_vendorCrossCheck(dep), injected before findings.sort. It compares dep.vendorEdpParsed.racks against the FROZEN dep.edpParsed.racks (the Engineering-Master snapshot) — NEVER the live Master (honors the freeze: a Master-scoped deployment can outlive its Master). Per cab matched by _rec_norm(rack name): model mismatch and uStart disagreement are HARD (uStart from locCabRu is authoritative); U-span/height differences are ADVISORY (Master height is inferred via master_nodeHeightU); planned devices missing from the vendor doc are med findings; and UNMATCHED vendor racks surface explicitly so a rack-id-convention divergence is visible rather than a silent zero-findings run. Host-less snapshot cabs are treated as 'no data', not a mismatch. (3) LEDGER + UI: vendor findings carry kind:'VENDOR', advisory, and rackId; reconcile_logDiscrepancy now maps advisory→severity 'low' with [VENDOR≠MASTER]/[ADVISORY] note markers and threads rackId (mirroring preflight_logDiscrepancy). reconcile_render gains a Vendor KPI tile (crit on hard findings, warn on advisory) and VENDOR≠MASTER/ADVISORY badges; the reconcile cacheKey now includes dep.vendorEdpAttachedAt so (re)attaching busts the cache. After attach the operator jumps to the Reconcile panel (Audits view) and the cross-check runs (locked UX). (4) PRE-FLIGHT carve-out: verified that Master-seeded racks already flow through PRE-FLIGHT's U-collision NO-GO via dep.edpParsed.racks — no new wiring needed (note: master_rackToElevation clamps slot uEnd to totalU, so chassis-won't-fit cannot fire for Master-seeded racks; tracked, not changed this ship). Reuses existing tokens/classes (b-mag/b-gold/b-red badges, kpi tiles), Rule-1 compliant. VERIFIED: node-checked; browser end-to-end (attach vendor EDP → VENDOR≠MASTER findings with uStart-hard / U-span-advisory; matched + unmatched cabs; host-less no-flood; edpParsed untouched; EDP-architect regression; freeze: cross-check works with the live Master cleared). POST-REVIEW (5-lens, 0 confirmed high/crit): added a vendor-aware reconcile sort rank (_rec_rank) so the 200-finding render cap can never evict vendor findings out from under their KPI count; added a nav_restore branch for the 'vendoredp:' screen (back-nav / shift-restore continuity); vendor discrepancy 'actual' column reads 'Vendor as-built'; and a file-still-loading guard on attach. Built in Claude Code on 5d59b12 (v1.6.89); web-Claude does post-merge parity review (one-builder rule). Three stamps at v1.6.90.
